title: Israel Claims Killing of Iran's Intelligence Minister
summary: Israel reports eliminating Iran's intelligence minister amid ongoing conflict, escalating tensions.
charlotte_impact: This action could provoke a strong response from Iran, further destabilizing the region and impacting global security.

title: Juliana Stratton Wins Illinois Democratic Primary

title: Joe Kent's Resignation Letter Reflects on Personal Loss

title: Iranian Missile Kills Couple in Ramat Gan

title: Fed Expected to Hold Rates Steady Amid Iran War
